# NymCard

> NymCard is full-stack payments infrastructure. Banks, fintechs, and businesses build card issuing, money movement, settlement, reconciliation, lending, and financial crime controls on one platform — nCore.

NymCard was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in London, with offices in Dubai, Riyadh, Cairo, Karachi, and Beirut. NymCard is a principal member of Visa and Mastercard, is PCI DSS Level 1 certified, and is ISO 27001 certified. The platform is called nCore: one customer record, one ledger, one audit trail, owned by NymCard. nCore can be deployed in the cloud, on-soil, or on-premise, and connects to an existing core banking system rather than replacing it.

## Platform

- [nCore](https://nymcard.com/platform/ncore): The full-stack payments and banking platform — card issuing, embedded lending, cross-border payments, settlement, reconciliation, and financial crime controls on a single architecture.

## Products

- [Card Issuing](https://nymcard.com/products/card-issuing): Issue debit, credit, and prepaid cards — physical, virtual, and tokenized — on nCore as a principal member of Visa and Mastercard.
- [Money Movement](https://nymcard.com/products/money-movement): Domestic and cross-border payments and multi-currency money movement.
- [Settlement](https://nymcard.com/products/settlement): Settlement including stablecoin settlement.
- [Reconciliation](https://nymcard.com/products/reconciliation): Automated reconciliation across the payment lifecycle.
- [Lending](https://nymcard.com/products/lending): Embedded lending — BNPL, revolving, and installment credit products.
- [Financial Crime](https://nymcard.com/products/financial-crime): Fraud monitoring, transaction risk decisioning, and 3DS controls.

- [Retail Banking](https://nymcard.com/industries/retail-banking)
- [Commercial Banking](https://nymcard.com/industries/commercial-banking)
